# Pad Thai Recipe

Pad Thai is a medium-difficulty Thai dish that can be prepared in just 15 minutes of prep time and 10 minutes of cooking, making it perfect for a quick weeknight meal that serves 4 people. Each serving contains 380 calories with 22g of protein, 45g of carbohydrates, and 12g of fat, providing a well-balanced nutritional profile. This classic Thai cuisine offers a delicious and relatively healthy option for those looking to enjoy authentic flavors without spending excessive time in the kitchen.
